title: Yoho's Vehicle Mod
description: A small project I'm working on in my spare time to add different classes of vehicles with different benefits to the game (everything is obtainable in survival)
body:
**_HEY, let me introduce myself, I'm Yoho, a Spanish-speaking content creator who has been interested in creating mods for a few months now._**

I created my first mod using Mcreator as a learning and Java comprehension tool. My plan is to gradually improve my mod until I have the necessary knowledge to optimize and improve it with my own code.


Whatever. That's not what you're interested in, is it?

This vehicle mod is in its very early stages. For now, it only adds three types of vehicles.

Motocross, ATVs, and sportbikes.

All items in the mod are craftable in Survival.

Each vehicle has its own special characteristics that can be adjusted in the future.

What do I plan to implement in the future?

- Better HUDs
- Better GUIs
- Sound implementation
- Special workbench implementation
- Unique textures for each vehicle color
- Snowmobile implementation (in development)
- Jet ski implementation
- 2- or more passenger vehicle implementation
- Fuel system (in development)
- Better animations for each vehicle type (future)
